subcodes.first_line: O divine friends and spiritual companions! Open your eyes unto the Most Glorious horizon and turn your gaze to the Supreme Concourse [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان الهی و یاران معنوی چشم بافق ابهی بگشااید و توجه بملاء اعلی نمااید
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual transformation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action
